title: Swaralaya Carnatic Fusion Concert
shortDescription: A mesmerizing night of Carnatic classical fusion melodies.
fullDescription: Swaralaya Carnatic Fusion Concert features legendary classical violinists and contemporary percussionists coming together. Experience a soulful dialogue between traditional Indian melodies and modern rhythms that will leave you spellbound.

title: Deccan Rock Festival
shortDescription: The ultimate rock and metal experience in the heart of Hyderabad.
fullDescription: Deccan Rock Festival returns for its biggest edition yet! Featuring top indie rock bands and legendary metal icons from across the country, this energy-packed event at Gachibowli Indoor Stadium is a must-attend for all rock music enthusiasts.

title: Bangalore Indie Pop Nights
shortDescription: Catch the rising stars of Indian Indie Pop live in action.
fullDescription: Experience the best of independent pop music under the stars at Palace Grounds. Bangalore Indie Pop Nights brings you smooth acoustic sets, groovy synth-pop rhythms, and incredible live performances by the most promising singer-songwriters of the generation.

title: Sunburn Club Tour Kochi
shortDescription: Kochi's biggest electronic dance music night of the year.
fullDescription: Sunburn Club Tour brings high-octane electronic dance music to Kochi. With stunning laser shows, immersive sound systems, and a lineup of top national and international DJs, prepare to dance the night away at the Jawaharlal Nehru Indoor Stadium.

title: India AI & Machine Learning Summit
shortDescription: India's largest gathering of AI researchers and practitioners.
fullDescription: The India AI & Machine Learning Summit at BIEC brings together leading tech minds, research scholars, and enterprise experts. Explore panels on generative AI, neural network architectures, machine learning scalability, and real-world deployment challenges in a comprehensive two-day conference.

title: National Developer Conference
shortDescription: Expand your coding skills with workshops led by industry leaders.
fullDescription: Join fellow software developers at the HITEX Exhibition Centre for the National Developer Conference. This event features technical deep dives, live-coding sessions, and intensive workshops on cloud architecture, React frameworks, and cybersecurity practices.

title: FinTech India Expo
shortDescription: Discover the future of banking, digital payments, and blockchain.
fullDescription: FinTech India Expo brings together pioneers from digital banking, retail finance, and decentralized systems at the Jio World Convention Centre. Explore panels on UPI scaling, security protocols, next-generation payments infrastructure, and upcoming regulatory guidelines.

title: Delhi Open Source Summit
shortDescription: A free community event celebrating open-source technologies.
fullDescription: Celebrate open-source contributions at the iconic Bharat Mandapam. This community-driven summit features panel talks by core project maintainers, workshops on containerization tools, and a collaborative hackathon for open-source development.

title: Global Startup Conclave
shortDescription: Network with venture capitalists and pitch your startup idea.
fullDescription: The Global Startup Conclave at BIEC is the ultimate platform for founders and builders. Pitch your ideas directly to top venture capital firms, participate in panel discussions on product-market fit, and attend mentorship workshops hosted by seasoned unicorns.

title: Corporate Leaders Roundtable
shortDescription: An exclusive assembly of C-suite executives discussing market growth.
fullDescription: Hosted at the Jio World Convention Centre, the Corporate Leaders Roundtable brings together executive leaders to share insights on digital transformation, global supply chain dynamics, and leadership models for managing high-performance corporate environments.

title: SME Growth & Retail Summit
shortDescription: Strategies and tools for scaling small and medium businesses.
fullDescription: The SME Growth & Retail Summit at CIDCO Exhibition Centre provides actionable insights for retail expansion. Connect with trade experts, learn marketing automation, explore digital onboarding systems, and adapt business structures to grow retail operations sustainably.

title: Real Estate Developers Forum
shortDescription: Free networking forum for urban developers and infrastructure experts.
fullDescription: The Real Estate Developers Forum at Shilpakala Vedika brings together urban planners, construction firms, and architects. Discuss sustainable architecture patterns, smart city integrations, and standard green building guidelines in a collaborative roundtable environment.

title: All-India Badminton Championship
shortDescription: Witness top badminton athletes competing for the national title.
fullDescription: Come and support the finest national badminton players at the Gachibowli Indoor Stadium. Experience the intensity of high-speed rallies, technical tactical play, and thrilling singles and doubles matches across a three-day national tournament.

title: Pro Kabaddi Fan Fest
shortDescription: The ultimate fan experience featuring live matches and meet-and-greets.
fullDescription: Join fellow Kabaddi fans at the Jawaharlal Nehru Indoor Stadium for a celebration of the sport. The Pro Kabaddi Fan Fest features live match screenings, player meet-and-greet sessions, interactive game zones, and merchandise stalls.

title: Bengaluru Marathon 2026
shortDescription: Join thousands of runners in the city's largest annual road race.
fullDescription: Lace up and run for health, community, and personal bests at the Bengaluru Marathon. Setting off from Palace Grounds, choose from full marathon, half marathon, or 10K categories. Water stations and support crews will be active throughout the route.

title: Jaipur Polo Championship
shortDescription: Classic royal polo championship matches under the desert sky.
fullDescription: The Jaipur Polo Championship showcases horse polo matches featuring top domestic and international riders. Experience the heritage, elegance, and sporting excellence of polo at its finest, along with premium catering services.

title: The Great Indian Street Food Festival
shortDescription: Savor culinary delights and street food treats from 28 states.
fullDescription: Indulge in India's rich culinary diversity at Pragati Maidan. The Great Indian Street Food Festival gathers top street vendors and culinary masters to prepare chat, kebabs, traditional sweets, and regional beverages from every corner of India.

title: Spices of Malabar Food Fest
shortDescription: Taste authentic coastal curries and aromatic biryanis.
fullDescription: Spices of Malabar brings the authentic flavors of coastal Kerala to the plate. Experience slow-cooked seafood curries, traditional biryanis, and coconut-infused desserts, along with live cooking demonstrations hosted by renowned coastal chefs.

title: Mumbai Wine & Cheese Soiree
shortDescription: An elegant evening of fine wine tastings and artisanal cheese pairings.
fullDescription: Indulge your senses at the Mumbai Wine & Cheese Soiree. Set at the NESCO Exhibition Centre, taste fine vintage selections from vineyards, paired with artisanal local and international cheeses, in a sophisticated social setting.

title: Deccan Culinary Masterclass
shortDescription: Learn traditional Nizami cooking techniques from expert chefs.
fullDescription: The Deccan Culinary Masterclass at Shilpakala Vedika is an interactive kitchen experience. Learn the traditional secrets of slow-dum cooking Nizami biryanis, aromatic curries, and authentic Hyderabadi desserts under the guidance of master chefs.
